summary: Iter-74 (11-item batch) testing complete. Backend 6/6 pytest PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_iter74.py — covering /admin/kiosk/qr-provider GET default=paytm, PUT toggle to razorpay + invalid=400, PUT-as-non-admin=403 (subscriber+staff both rejected) while GET-as-staff=200, kiosk/order with provider=paytm returns upi://pay?pa= intent (razorpay_qr_id null), provider=razorpay attempts Razorpay QR Codes API (LIVE key REJECTED the QR create → backend gracefully falls back to UPI intent — acceptable per brief), plus regression on mess-menu/order cash dining + +91 phone validation. Frontend mobile 390x844: (a) /home PASS — Call us (l=99.5, w=81) + WhatsApp (l=188.5, w=102) pills together centered horizontally (combined left=99.5, right=99.5 — symmetric). (b) /login PASS — login-top-marquee inner div has 'border-y-4 border-white rounded-lg' class; login-tagline-pill present with text 'You are one step away from ghar se accha khana' below the login card with healthy spacing. (c) /contact PASS — contact-3d-pin-emblem present with lucide-chef-hat SVG (not utensils), zero '3D' text in DOM (has3DBadge=false), caption 'EFOODCARE' only. (d) Footer brand PASS — data-testid='footer-brand-name' has color=rgb(255,255,255) pure white, textShadow='none', className='font-display font-extrabold text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight text-white' — no shadow utility, no inline style. (e) /restaurant logged-out on-spot OTP DELIVERY flow — invalid phone='12' → toast 'Enter a valid +91 Indian mobile number for delivery' fires AND order-otp-block does NOT appear AND no /login redirect. (f) Valid phone='9876543210' → POST /api/auth/send-otp returns {ok:true, dev_otp:'454236', dev_mode:true}, order-otp-block appears in-place with title 'VERIFY +91 9876543210 · 1-TAP LOGIN' + order-otp-input + order-otp-verify + Resend + Cancel buttons. (g) After OTP verify the user lands on /home (logged-in landing) — NO /login redirect ✓ — BUT no /api/mess-menu/order POST was triggered after OTP verify in our run; the brief expected the order to auto-fire with 'Order placed/paid · ₹140' toast. Could be a missed call by the response listener (page navigated immediately) — main agent should self-verify the auto-fire after OTP-verify path.

minor.issue: Razorpay LIVE key rejected the qrcode.create call → backend correctly falls back to UPI intent. Per the iter-74 brief this is acceptable. Razorpay account may need QR Codes API enablement on the dashboard to test the qr_*/image_url branch end-to-end.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'About us' link to /about does NOT appear in the hamburger drawer on /home. The DEFAULT_INFO array in Header.jsx (line 12-18) correctly lists 'about' as the first entry, BUT line 38 prefers CMS items if present: `const info = (cmsInfo || DEFAULT_INFO).filter(...)`. The CMS /header-menu response is non-null and missing 'about', so DEFAULT_INFO is shadowed and the new link never renders. Drawer shows only: Home, Plans, Contact, Contact for Franchisee, Privacy Policy, Refund Policy.

integration_issues.issue: After successful OTP verify on the in-place order-otp-block, the user is logged-in (URL becomes /home, NOT /login — good), but the expected immediate POST /api/mess-menu/order did not fire in our test run. We did not observe the 'Order placed/paid · ₹140' toast. Could be a navigation-race that disconnected our response listener OR the auto-fire-after-verifyOnSpotOtp path is missing. Main agent should self-verify the verifyOnSpotOtp() handler in TodayMessMenuFlash.jsx (around line 240) actually calls submitOrder() after setUser().

action_items: HIGH — Fix Header.jsx info-section CMS shadowing so the new 'About us' entry always renders. Either (a) merge DEFAULT_INFO ∪ cmsInfo by id (preserving CMS overrides), or (b) seed the /header-menu CMS doc with the about entry on startup, or (c) update the CMS data via the admin UI now.

MEDIUM — Verify the on-spot OTP verify handler auto-fires /api/mess-menu/order after setUser() — currently the URL goes to /home with no order POST captured. If intentional, update the brief; if a bug, ensure submitOrder() runs inside verifyOnSpotOtp() success path.

INFO — Razorpay LIVE QR Codes API was rejected for our test merchant → fallback to UPI intent is the path being exercised. Confirm with Razorpay dashboard that 'QR Codes' product is enabled for the merchant if you want to ship the razorpay-image branch.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx line 38: `(cmsInfo || DEFAULT_INFO)` pattern silently drops new client-side default entries the moment any CMS doc exists. Should merge by id with CMS taking precedence on overlap, otherwise every future DEFAULT_INFO change needs a parallel CMS edit.

mess_menu_cal.py line 411-412: `initial_status = 'pending_collection' if payment_method=='cash' else 'awaiting_payment'` — for mixed payment with online_amount=0 (which is already rejected at line 368) this is moot, but for online-only with razorpay fallback to UPI we still report awaiting_payment with no Razorpay polling. Consider tagging the order doc with qr_provider='paytm_fallback' when Razorpay was requested but failed, so the kiosk UI knows to NOT poll /payment-status.

TodayMessMenuFlash.jsx — please verify verifyOnSpotOtp() actually calls the submitOrder() helper after setUser(). The brief explicitly states the order should be placed immediately on a single OTP verify; right now end-to-end our automation lands on /home without an /api/mess-menu/order POST fired.

/api/admin/kiosk/order/{id}/payment-status — when Razorpay QR was never created (paytm provider OR razorpay fallback to UPI), endpoint returns {ok:true, polled:false, online_paid:false}. Frontend kiosk poller should disable polling in that case to avoid wasteful 2-4s intervals. Currently AdminKiosk.jsx uses razorpay-polling-effect at line ~187 — gate it on razorpay_qr_id presence.

success_rate.frontend: ~80% (6/7 verified — About-us-in-drawer FAIL; on-spot-OTP auto-fire UNVERIFIED)

test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md — admin via OTP allowlist, dev_otp returned in send-otp body. send-otp during this test returned dev_otp=454236/273818.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily seeded today's mess_menu doc with note='iter74_seed' (lunch='Dal bhaji rice', dinner='Aloo paratha') to render the order form on /restaurant. DELETED at end of run (deleted_count=1).
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter74.py covers the iter-74 backend endpoints. Note the TodayMessMenuFlash testids: order-svc-{dining,delivery,takeaway}, order-pay-{online,cash,wallet}, order-phone, order-place, order-otp-block, order-otp-input, order-otp-verify, order-otp-resend, order-otp-cancel. The hamburger trigger is data-testid='menu-toggle-button' (NOT 'menu-trigger'). Razorpay LIVE rejects qrcode.create — expect the UPI fallback path to be the live behaviour. The order flow form is collapsed by default and needs a click on data-testid='menu-order-now' to expand. Seed mess_menu for today before testing /restaurant order form.
